zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Neville於1339年2月12日出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親Ralph Neville48歲，母親Alice de Audley40歲。她於1358年7月12日與Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland在英國達勒姆布朗加斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1372年5月12日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Neville于1339年2月12日出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，她的父亲Ralph Neville48岁，母亲Alice de Audley40岁。她于1358年7月12日与Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland在英国達勒姆布朗加斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1372年5月12日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Neville was born on 12 February 1339, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 48 and her mother, Alice de Audley, was 40. She married Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland on 12 July 1358, in Brancepeth, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 May 1372, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33, and was buried in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Neville est née le 12 février 1339, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice de Audley, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland le 12 juillet 1358, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1372, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Neville am 12. Februar 1339 in Raby Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Neville 48 und ihre Mutter Alice de Audley 40. Sie hat am 12. Juli 1358 in Brancepeth, Durham, England Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1372 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Neville è nata il il 12 febbraio 1339 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Alice de Audley, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland il 12 luglio 1358, nel Brancepeth, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 maggio 1372, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Nevilleが1339年2月12日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは48歳，母Alice de Audleyは40歳であった。1358年7月12日にイギリスダルハムブランセペスでHenry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1372年5月12日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Neville(이)가 1339년 2월 12일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Audley(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1358년 7월 12일 영국 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에 묻혔다.

pt.12 February 1339–12 May 1372: 12 de fevereiro de 1339–12 de maio de 1372
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Neville nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1339, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Audley, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland em 12 de julho de 1358, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1372, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Neville родилась 12 февраля 1339 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Audley, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland 12 июля 1358 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 мая 1372 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.12 February 1339–12 May 1372: 12 de febrero de 1339–12 de mayo de 1372
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Neville nació el 12 de febrero de 1339, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice de Audley, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Henry Percy 1st Earl of Northumberland el 12 de julio de 1358, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1372, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
